mapper.update: UPDATE todo_item SET status = 'UNFINISHED', completed_at = NULL, cancelled_at = NULL, remind_at = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = FALSE AND due_at IS NOT NULL AND due_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND status NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED', 'UNFINISHED')
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM todo_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = FALSE
AND status IN
#{status}
AND ( title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(description, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY CASE WHEN status = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 1 WHEN status = 'PENDING' THEN 2 WHEN status = 'UNFINISHED' THEN 3 WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 4 WHEN status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END, COALESCE(due_at, updated_at, created_at) DESC, updated_at DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todo_item (user_id, title, description, due_at, remind_at, status, completed_at, cancelled_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{dueAt}, #{remindAt}, #{status}, #{completedAt}, #{cancelledAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE todo_item SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, due_at = #{dueAt}, remind_at = #{remindAt}, status = #{status}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, cancelled_at = #{cancelledAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE todo_item SET status = #{status}, remind_at = #{remindAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, cancelled_at = #{cancelledAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM todo_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = FALSE AND status NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED') AND due_at IS NOT NULL AND due_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND remind_at IS NOT NULL AND remind_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM todo_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = FALSE AND status NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED')

SELECT * FROM todo_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = FALSE AND ( title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(description, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY similarity(title, #{keyword}) DESC, updated_at DESC LIMIT 10
